title: Taxi to the Hotel
content: After a long flight, Ethan was tired and ready to rest. He collected his luggage and took a taxi from the airport to his hotel. During the ride, he watched the city pass by through the window. Bright signs, busy streets, and unfamiliar buildings made everything feel exciting and new. The driver pointed out several famous attractions along the way and recommended a local restaurant. By the time they reached the hotel, Ethan already felt curious about exploring the city. First, however, he needed a shower and a good night’s sleep.
